description: A heavily designed vertical promotional/propaganda graphic co-branded with the conservative outlet Daily Wire+. The top half is a torn-paper, off-white textured background carrying the black 'DAILY WIRE +' wordmark (with a small red plus sign) above a thin red rule reading '— EXCLUSIVE —', followed by the serif headline 'ICE's Most Heroic Moments Of 2025' and a bold pull-quote: '"Officers show up knowing the risks they face — and they choose to serve anyway."' The bottom half, separated by a ragged torn-paper edge, is a dramatic, color-graded nighttime photograph bathed in blue/purple police-light glow: a masked, heavily armored officer wearing a vest marked 'POLICE' walks a handcuffed detainee (hands cuffed behind his back, gray jacket, jeans, ball cap) up a road past SUVs with flashing red-and-blue emergency lights and other officers in the misty background. The composition is cinematic and moody, designed to look like a film-poster or magazine cover. Messaging technique: heroic framing/glorification of ICE agents as selfless, courageous public servants, laundered through a friendly partisan-media 'exclusive,' to build positive emotional sympathy for ICE enforcement. Target audience: pro-enforcement, conservative-media-aligned public.
notable_text: DAILY WIRE + ; EXCLUSIVE; ICE's Most Heroic Moments Of 2025; "Officers show up knowing the risks they face — and they choose to serve anyway."
